mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName, c.location AS courtLocation FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName, c.location AS courtLocation FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.*, u.username AS username, c.court_name AS courtName, c.location AS courtLocation FROM reservations r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courts c ON r.court_id = c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations (user_id, court_id, reserve_date, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courtId}, #{reserveDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
